examples: As people grow older they generally become less dexterous.
I've found that my handwork with yarn has helped my arthritic fingers remain more dexterous as I age.
I've found that my handiwork with yarn has helped my arthritic fingers remain more dexterous as I age.
At the Bar he was a fine judge, dexterous in argument and scrupulously fair in his rulings.
It's an awkward gesture (except for a left-handed person) but is justified aesthetically because it extends from Jesus's dexterous command.
